build.description: Full development agent with all tools enabled for F1 pipeline work

plan.description: Planning and analysis agent for F1 pipeline without making changes

python.description: Python development agent using UV for package and dependency management

pytest_tester.description: Python testing agent specializing in running tests with pytest and using UV for execution.

test.description: Run pytest tests for F1 pipeline
test.template: Run the full test suite for the F1 pipeline using pytest. Show any failures and suggest fixes. You can use the @pytest_tester agent to white the tests

lint.template: Run linting and formatting checks for the F1 pipeline. Use ruff for linting and fix any issues found.

review-changes.description: Review code changes for quality and best practices
review-changes.template: Review recent code changes for quality, performance, and adherence to F1 Python standards. Provide feedback on improvements.

plan.description: Create a development plan for F1 pipeline without modifying files
plan.template: Focus on the mentioned files, there is no need to analyze the whole codebase unless instructed to do so.
